Example: Display an element when max row count is 10: <div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div> The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders. --> <div class="skeleton-container"> <!-- Header Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div> <!-- Body Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div> </div>falsemda8e316de477fbe50a0d66d1f316d43c08679ef89cb21120000f8d856634c9c4fsp_instanceadmin2026-03-27 12:42:17935cd4c747fff290a0d66d1f316d43052f35861a4477b3250a0d66d1f316d432ef35861a4477b3250a0d66d1f316d432esp_instance_935cd4c747fff290a0d66d1f316d4305admin2026-03-27 13:09:28<url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{ "html": { "value": "<p><span style=\"color: rgb(215, 58, 73);
